titleStmt.title: SII 17.318: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 318. (A.R. No. 289 of 1904.) KĀḶAHASTI, KALAHASTI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine in the Kāḷahastīśvara temple.

This inscription records a royal gift of 46 kaḻañju of gold weighed by dhanmakkaṭṭaḷaikkal for a diadem (paṭṭam) to god Tirukkāḷatti Uḍaiyār. It also registers the donation of 30 cows by Śaṅkarappāḍi Tāḻi Sōmaṉ of Mummuḍiśōḻapuram for a perpetual lamp to the same god. The cows were entrusted into the hands of the shepherd Poṉ-Mādan of Tīttambākkam in Īkkāṭṭu-kkōṭṭam.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉnivaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum poṟcayappāvaiyuñ cirttani celviyun taṉ perunte
viyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭutiyalūḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟaināṭu ntuṭarvaṉavelip paṭar vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷic cūḻmatiḷ koḷḷippā
kkaiyum naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum perukaṭaliḻattaraicar
tamuṭiyum Āṅkavar teviya roṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉnavar pakkal teṉ
navaṉ vaitta cun=taramuṭiyum In=tiraṉnāramum teṇṭirai yīḻamaṇṭalamuḻuvatu Eṟipa
ṭai keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟcūṭiya kulataṉamākiya palarpukaḻ muṭiyuñ ceṅkatir mālaiyu
ñ caṅkatir velait tol peruṅkāvaṟ palpaḻan=tivum ceruviṟ cinavil Irupattoru kālaraicu
kaḷaikaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ melvaruñ cān=timaṟṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅki
yil mutukiṭṭoḷikka cayaciṅkaṉ Aḷapperum pukaḻoṭum piṭiyil Iraṭṭapāṭiyeḻarai Ilakkamum navanetik kulapperumalaika
ḷum vikkirama virar cakkarakoṭṭamum mutirvaṭavallai maturamaṇṭalamuṅ kāmiṭavaḷa nāmaṇaikkoṇaiyum veñcilavirar pañca
p paḷḷiyum pācaṭappaḻana mācuṇi tecamum Ayarvil vaṇkirtti yātinakaravaiyiṟ can=tiraṉṟolkulat
tin=tirarataṉai viḷaiyamarkaḷattiṟ kiḷaioṭum piṭittup palataṉattoṭuniṟai kulataṉakkuvai
yum kiṭṭarum ceṟimiḷai Oṭṭaviṣaiyamum pūcurarcernal kocalaināṭum tanmapālaṉai
vammuṉaiyaḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colait taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇukat tākkit tikkaṇa
kirttit takkaṇalāṭamuṅ kovin=tacan=taṉ māviḻin=toṭat taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷa tecamu
n=toṭukaṭaṟcaṅkuoṭaṭal mahipālaṉai veñcamar viḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum
nittila neṭuṅkaṭaṟ Uttiralāṭamum veṟimalartirtta teṟipuṉaṟkaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭalnaṭu vuḷ palakalañcelutti caṅki
rāmavicaiyottuṅkapanmanākiya kiṭārat taraicaṉai vākaik kkariyoṭu makappaṭut turimaiyiṟ piṟakkiya perunetip pi
ṟakkamum Ārttavaṉa(na)kanakar portoḻil vācal viccātira toraṇamum moyttoḷiṟ puṉamaṇi puravamum kaṉama
ṇikkatavamum niṟaijivijaiyamum tuṟainīrpaṇṇaiyum vanmalaiyūr ṟṟoṉmalaiyūrum Āḻkaṭalakaḻcūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamum
kalaṅkāvalviṉai Ilaṅkāyokamum kāppuṟuniṟaipunal māpappāḷamum kāvalam puricai mevili paṅkamum viḷai
pantūṟiṭai vaḷaippantūṟuṭai talait takkorpukaḻ talaittakkolamum taṟumāval viṉai mātamāliṅkamum kalāmuri kaṭun=tiṟali
lāmuritecamum tenakkalarpoḻil mānakkavāramum toṭukaṭaṟ kāval kaṭumuraṭk kaṭāramu māpporutaṇṭāṟkoṇṭa kopparakecaripanmarā
ṉa śrīrājen=tiracoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 4 lāvatu Uṭaiyār śrīrājan=tiracoḻa tevar tirukkāḷatti Uṭaiyārkku
Aruḷiṉa poṉ taṉmakaṭṭaḷaikkallāl nāṟpattaṟu kaḻañcināṟ ceta paṭṭam 1— nāḷataṉāla mummuṭico
rattuc caṅkarappāṭiyāṉ tāḻicoḻaṉ tirukkāḷatti Uṭaiyārkku tirunan=tāviḷakku Oṉṟinukku Īkkāṭṭukko
ṭṭattu tittampākkattu maṉṟāṭi poṉmātan can=tirātittavaṟkku nicatam Uḻakku ney Aṭṭakkaṭavatākak ko
ṇṭa cāvāmuvāp pacu muppatu .
Digital edition of SII 17.318 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
